methods.description: Process for isolating and analyzing proteins from cell cultures, including preparation for SDS-PAGE and Blue Native-PAGE.

steps.description: Total protein content was isolated from cell cultures in midexponential phase in 50 mM HEPES buffer supplemented with EDTA-free protein inhibitor cocktail.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate total protein content from cell cultures

steps.description: Cell walls were broken by three 30-s cycles at 600 g in the presence of micro glass beads.
steps.searchable_summary: break cell walls using micro glass beads

steps.description: The protein extracts were clarified by centrifugation and proteins were precipitated for 20 min at -20°C in 80% (v/v) acetone.
steps.searchable_summary: clarify protein extracts and precipitate proteins

steps.description: After centrifugation, the pellet was solubilized for 5 min at 4°C in 50 mM Tris (pH 7.6) and 2% sodium dodecyl sulphate (SDS), supplemented with EDTA-free protein inhibitor cocktail.
steps.searchable_summary: solubilize protein pellet in Tris-SDS solution

steps.description: For PtKEA3 protein detection, extracts enriched in membrane proteins were prepared by centrifugation and washing with HEPES and NaCl.
steps.searchable_summary: enrich membrane proteins by centrifugation and washing

steps.description: Samples were prepared according to standard protocols for sodium dodecyl sulphate-polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis (SDS-PAGE).
For Blue Native-PAGE, chloroplasts were isolated, thylakoids collected, solubilized, and prepared for gel running.

methods.description: Procedure for measuring chlorophyll fluorescence and NPQ induction in the dark by pH shift.

steps.description: 200 µl of cell suspension were placed on wells of a 96-well plate at a cell concentration of 2 x 10^6 cells ml^-1.
Cells were dark-adapted for 10 min prior to measurements.
Wells were imaged for fluorescence emission using a Speedzen III fluorescence imaging setup.
steps.searchable_summary: image fluorescence emission using Speedzen III

steps.description: NPQ was calculated as (F m - F m 0 )/F m 0 and effective quantum yield of photosystem II (Φ PSII ) as (F m 0 - F s )/F m 0.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate NPQ and Φ PSII from fluorescence data

steps.description: For measurements of NPQ induction in the dark, cells were concentrated by centrifugation and resuspended in fresh ESAW.
steps.searchable_summary: concentrate and resuspend cells for NPQ induction

steps.description: The external pH was acidified by sequential additions of acetic acid and then neutralized using potassium hydroxide (KOH).
steps.searchable_summary: adjust external pH using acetic acid and KOH

steps.description: Fluorescence was measured with a PAM-101 fluorimeter after pH equilibration.

methods.description: Adaptation of an ODE-based kinetic model of electron transport chain for diatoms to model NPQ.

steps.description: Modelling of NPQ was done adapting to diatoms an ordinary differential equations (ODEs)-based kinetic model of electron transport chain.
steps.searchable_summary: adapt ODE-based kinetic model for NPQ in diatoms

steps.description: The model comprises a set of five ODEs following the dynamics of plastoquinones, ATP, proton concentration, xanthophylls, and ATPase.
steps.searchable_summary: define ODEs for electron transport chain dynamics

steps.description: Major changes to this model include parameter modifications, PMF partitioning, and a simpler NPQ model.
steps.searchable_summary: modify model parameters and introduce PMF partitioning

steps.description: The model has been implemented using MODELBASE software in PYTHON.
steps.searchable_summary: implement NPQ model using MODELBASE in Python
